Home / Projects / MIT Retail Building
Project Type Retail Construction
Location Auburn, WA
Sector Commercial Retail

MIT Retail Building

The MIT Retail Building stands as a flagship project in our retail construction portfolio—a modern, purpose-built facility that exemplifies what contemporary retail construction should achieve. Located in Auburn, Washington's thriving commercial corridor, this project delivered a versatile retail space designed to attract quality tenants and serve the community for decades.

From foundation to finish, we managed every aspect of this ground-up retail construction. The design prioritizes visibility and accessibility, with prominent street presence and efficient site circulation that makes the space attractive to both retailers and their customers. Interior spaces feature flexible layouts that accommodate various retail formats, with robust infrastructure supporting modern retail technology and operational needs.

The building's clean, professional exterior combines durability with aesthetic appeal—a balance that's critical in commercial retail where first impressions drive traffic. Quality materials and thoughtful detailing create a facility that maintains its appearance and value while withstanding the demands of daily retail operations.

Project Highlights

  • Ground-up retail construction with modern design and finishes
  • Strategic location on high-traffic Auburn commercial corridor
  • Flexible interior spaces accommodating diverse retail uses
  • Prominent storefront visibility and excellent curb appeal
  • Efficient site design maximizing parking and customer access
  • Comprehensive infrastructure supporting modern retail operations
  • Quality construction built to maintain value over decades

The MIT Retail Building represents the kind of enduring, practical commercial construction that Northway has delivered for over 20 years. It's a building that works—for tenants, for customers, and for the community it serves.
